response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 87
REASON: The document contains several implausible provisions (such as waiving unauthorized practice of law requirements and permitting paralegals to draft legal documents without pre-filing attorney review) that contradict established California legal ethics rules and State Bar precedent, and no such protocol appears in official State Bar archives or recent announcements.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 87
REASON: The document's provisions authorizing unsupervised paralegal legal drafting and waiving unauthorized practice requirements contradict California Business & Professions Code §6125 and established State Bar ethics rules, and no such 2025 protocol exists in official State Bar records.
